title: crateva formosensis
intro: Crateva formosensis is a species of flowering plant in the capparid family, native to Taiwan and southern China, known for its medicinal and traditional uses. This plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Crateva formosensis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Crateva formosensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a salve or poultice to treat various ailments.
